case_title: THOMPSON, STEPHEN VS BANSUELO, ELICIA M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY THOMPSON, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT BANSUELO, ELICIA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BANSUELO, ELICIA M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANSUELO, ELICIA M. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.35 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $283.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $377.97 AS TO DEFENDANT BANSUELO, ELICIA M.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANSUELO, ELICIA M.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $65.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BANSUELO, ELICIA M.
